title: cota woronowii
intro: Cota woronowii, also known as the Cota daisy, is a plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. The medicinal properties of Cota woronowii lie in its leaves and flowers, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions due to their anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cota woronowii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and soothe skin irritations. Cota woronowii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use, although its effectiveness and safety should be verified by a healthcare professional.
